Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
All parameters are within normal limits except for mildly low blood glucose (65.1 mg/dL), which may indicate risk of hypoglycemia and should be clinically correlated. Lipid profile, renal function, electrolytes, and HbA1c are unremarkable. No evidence of proteinuria. Overall, results are stable with only mild hypoglycemia to monitor.
